staticText: Read-only African Business Idea Evidence Explorer in native English and French. It queries only the allowlisted public projection of the business_ideas dataset after an explicit user search and normalizes each row before display. A row requires an id, name, two-letter country code and supported sector; invalid and duplicate rows are excluded. Starting cost, monthly revenue and break-even values are labelled as submitted planning estimates, not verified prices, returns, profitability or forecasts. The current reviewed projection does not expose unproved provenance columns, so missing provenance is disclosed. Optional per-row source, as-of date and confidence fields are shown only if a future reviewed response contract explicitly supplies them. Search has bounded timeout, retry, offline, empty, error and stale-abort states and invents no fallback result. Users may explicitly add up to six records to a versioned browser-local shortlist, clear it, import or download a JSON backup, and export a local comparison by copy, TXT, formula-safe CSV, full JSON, parser-readable PDF or print. No generative AI advisor, regulation claim, community submission, vote, account save, automatic save, collaboration, widget, API promise or prefill is supplied. The AI manifest is route-only.
